scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,PATIENT,THERAPIST,ADMIN" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix patient-app" "npm run dev --prefix therapist-app" "npm run dev --prefix admin-panel"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix patient-app && npm install --prefix therapist-app && npm install --prefix admin-panel
